category_sources: source_facts.description says tcpreplay replays saved tcpdump files at arbitrary speeds.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives tcpreplay; current_curation.display-name also gives tcpreplay.
docs_sources: Official tcpreplay GitHub README points users to the official tcpreplay wiki for documentation and downloads.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/appneta/tcpreplay; per instruction repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions replaying tcpdump files; official repository topics include pcap, traffic, packet-generator, and performance-testing.
